subject: V INTERESTING
body:
In Virginia's deposition against you  and in virtually all articles up today in the Daily Mail it was stated that I had that I led Virginia  to the massage room where things of a sexual nature took place, but the article in todays paper she claims some women that was not me  -to quote from todays paper “another women” was responsible..I think this is a very significant departure from her story as clearly had it been me (if in fact that even happened) it would have been repeated as it has been in every previous article..why she has changed her story is also interesting.
Her changing her story versus what is in her deposition must be of interest to you?? Alan? What do you want to do with that??
